data.title: TAO shares surged over 20% intraday after Jensen Huang praised Bittensor's technological achievements.
data.description: OKX stock data shows that TAO has risen more than 20% intraday, currently trading at $304.1. Previously, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang mentioned Bittensor in the All-In podcast, stating that its Subnet 3 successfully trained a 4 billion-parameter Llama model, with the entire process completed collaboratively by distributed computing power, calling it a "remarkable technological achievement."

data.title: UK Two-Year Bond Performance Lags Behind German Counterpart
data.description: UK two-year government bonds opened flat today following a significant decline on Thursday, underperforming compared to German bonds. According to Jin10, the recent market movements have raised concerns among investors about the stability and future outlook of UK bonds. The comparison with German bonds highlights the differing economic conditions and investor sentiment between the two countries. Analysts are closely monitoring the situation to assess potential impacts on the broader financial markets.

data.title: Picasso Masterpiece Remains Hidden Amid Iran Conflict
data.description: A Picasso painting, considered a precursor to the renowned 'Guernica,' remains stored in a basement in Tehran as conflict continues in Iran. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the artwork's obscured status amid the ongoing turmoil. The masterpiece, which holds significant historical and artistic value, has been largely inaccessible to the public due to the current situation in the region. The painting's concealment underscores the broader impact of the conflict on cultural heritage and the arts in Iran.

data.title: Iran's Supreme Leader Mourns Intelligence Minister's Death Amid Tensions
data.description:
Iran's Supreme Leader has expressed condolences over the death of Intelligence Minister Hatib, praising his dedication and urging intelligence officials to work harder to fill the void left by his passing. According to RTHK, Hatib was reportedly killed in an Israeli military strike on Tehran. Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu stated on Thursday that regime change in Iran is a goal of Israeli and U.S. military actions, hinting at the possibility of ground operations.

A spokesperson for Iran's parliamentary committee on national security and foreign policy stated that Iran currently has no plans to negotiate with the United States. The spokesperson reiterated that any country allowing its territory or military bases to be used by Iran's enemies would be considered a direct participant in the conflict and a target for Iran.

data.title: Significant Transfer of GPS Tokens from GoPlus
data.description: A substantial transfer of GPS tokens has been reported. According to ChainCatcher, at 15:54, 1.6 billion GPS tokens were moved from GoPlus to a contract address starting with 0x7448.

data.title: STOCKS | Super Micro Computer Shares Drop Over 20% Pre-Market
data.description: Super Micro Computer (SMCI.O) experienced a significant decline in its stock price, falling over 20% in pre-market trading. According to Jin10, this drop comes amid broader market volatility and investor concerns. The company's performance and future outlook are under scrutiny as market participants assess the implications of this sharp decline. Analysts are closely monitoring the situation to understand the factors driving this downturn and its potential impact on the tech sector.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 71,000 USDT with a 1.17% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 20, 2026, 08:08 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 71,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 71,017.0625 USDT, with a narrowed 1.17% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Binance Alpha: The minimum requirement to claim the Cysic airdrop is 240 points, and claiming it will consume 15 points.
data.description: Binance Wallet announced that the second wave of the Binance Alpha Cysic (CYS) airdrop has begun. Users need to hold at least 240 points to participate, and a successful claim will consume 15 points. This airdrop operates on a first-come, first-served basis, with each user eligible to receive 60 CYS. If the reward pool is not fully allocated, the claim threshold will decrease by 5 points every 5 minutes. Users must complete the claim confirmation within 24 hours, otherwise it will be considered a forfeit.

data.title: Aster Chain staking feature launched, dual reward mechanism empowers the ASTER ecosystem
data.description: Aster today announced the official launch of its Aster Chain staking feature. This marks a core upgrade for the ASTER token, following airdrops and buyback programs, and is gradually building a closed-loop ecosystem that allows long-term holders to benefit from the protocol's growth. Starting today, users can delegate ASTER to validators and flexibly choose their lock-up period, earning weekly rewards through a dual mechanism of Base Rewards and Loyalty Rewards. • Base Rewards: Initially 150,000 ASTER. Users earn these rewards by delegating tokens to validators; the yield depends on the validator's transaction processing volume and the user's staking percentage. • Loyalty Rewards: Initially 300,000 ASTER, including additional subsidies from the platform's buyback program. Users can lock ASTER (up to 208 weeks) to exchange for veASTER; reward weighting is determined by the locked amount, lock-up period, and transaction volume. To ensure network security, Aster Chain initially partnered with Trust Wallet, BNB Chain, World Liberty Financial, Lista DAO, and PancakeSwap as validators, working with the Aster Foundation to safeguard node security. Users simply need to log in to the staking page, select a validator, enter the amount to stake, and confirm the lock-up period to complete the process. The staking cycle runs Monday through Sunday, UTC time. Users must complete their staking before 00:00 UTC on Monday to ensure eligibility for the next cycle's reward settlement. For detailed staking guidelines and technical instructions, please refer to the official documentation.

data.title: OKX Boost lists Block Street (BSB) on X Launch, offering over 5.35 million tokens in rewards.
data.description: According to official news, OKX Wallet has officially launched the Block Street (BSB) X Launch event on the OKX Boost product platform. Eligible users can participate to share a prize pool of 5.35M+ BSB. Block Street is a unified liquidity layer for on-chain capital markets, connecting traditional capital markets with decentralized finance (DeFi) and providing core infrastructure for the next generation of on-chain financial markets. OKX Wallet, as a leading one-stop Web3 portal, already supports over 140 popular public chains.

data.title: Musk: The X platform will release a major AI algorithm update and be open source next week.
data.description: Musk stated that the X platform will release a major AI algorithm update next week, and plans to open-source it simultaneously. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Iran's Revolutionary Guards Spokesperson Killed in Attack
data.description: On March 20, local time, a spokesperson for Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guards was killed in an attack. According to Jin10, the incident has raised concerns about security and stability in the region. Further details about the circumstances of the attack and the identity of the assailants have not been disclosed. The Iranian government is expected to investigate the matter thoroughly to determine the motives behind the attack and to prevent future incidents. This development comes amid ongoing tensions in the Middle East, highlighting the volatile nature of the geopolitical landscape.

data.title: BTS Concert in Seoul Triggers Disaster Alert Due to Expected Large Crowds
data.description:
The South Korean boy band BTS is set to perform with its full lineup at Gwanghwamun Square in Seoul, drawing an anticipated crowd of 170,000 to 260,000 people. According to RTHK, authorities have issued a Level 2 disaster crisis alert for the Jung-gu and Jongno-gu districts, effective from 7 a.m. Saturday to 7 a.m. Sunday, marking the first time the government has issued such an alert for a specific event.

The Ministry of Culture, Sports, and Tourism has established a situation room at the National Museum of Korean Contemporary History near the stage to monitor and maintain safety and order. To ensure security, the police have deployed 7,000 officers and equipped them with anti-drone systems. Access control measures will be implemented in several buildings around the venue, and three nearby subway stations will be closed.

Yonhap News Agency reports that the disaster crisis alert system is divided into four levels: attention, caution, alert, and severe, with Level 2 being the second lowest.

data.title: ECB's Villeroy: France Faces Limited Budgetary Flexibility
data.description: The European Central Bank's Governing Council member, François Villeroy de Galhau, has highlighted the constrained budgetary flexibility facing France. According to Jin10, Villeroy emphasized the limited room for maneuver in France's fiscal policy, underscoring the challenges the country faces in managing its budget effectively. This statement comes amid broader discussions on fiscal policies within the European Union, as member states navigate economic pressures and strive for financial stability.

data.title: Denmark's Contingency Plan for Potential U.S. Military Action in Greenland
data.description: Denmark reportedly implemented a contingency plan in January to counter potential U.S. military actions in Greenland. According to Ming Pao, the Danish media reported on Thursday that Denmark had deployed troops and transported explosives to the island. The plan included the possibility of damaging airport runways to prevent U.S. military transport aircraft from landing if necessary.

data.title: India's Natural Gas Retailers Seek Market Expansion Amid Middle East Conflict
data.description:
India's natural gas retailers are actively working to increase their market share following significant disruptions in the supply of a widely used alternative cooking fuel due to the ongoing conflict in the Middle East. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the challenges faced by the industry as it navigates the impact of geopolitical tensions on fuel availability.

The conflict has led to severe shortages, prompting Indian retailers to explore opportunities to fill the gap left by the rival fuel. This strategic move aims to capitalize on the current market conditions and secure a stronger foothold in the energy sector.

As the situation in the Middle East continues to evolve, Indian natural gas companies are focusing on enhancing their distribution networks and improving accessibility to ensure a steady supply to consumers. This effort is part of a broader strategy to mitigate the effects of the shortages and maintain energy security in the region.

The expansion plans come at a critical time, as the demand for reliable and affordable cooking fuel remains high. By increasing their market presence, India's natural gas retailers hope to provide a viable alternative to the disrupted supply chain and support the country's energy needs.

data.title: South Korea to Appoint Private Custody Provider for Seized Virtual Assets
data.description: South Korea's National Tax Service is preparing to appoint a private custody provider for seized virtual assets, potentially as early as the first half of this year. According to NS3.AI, the tax agency is in the process of drafting selection standards, which may encompass security requirements, company size, and insurance coverage, in accordance with the Virtual Asset User Protection Act.

data.title: Biotech Firm Dexel Launches IPO with Global Offering
data.description: Biotech company Dexel, which specializes in developing medical imaging products and services, has initiated its initial public offering (IPO) process. According to Ming Pao, the company is offering 7.9992 million shares globally, with 10% allocated for public offering in Hong Kong. The shares are priced between HKD 95.6 and HKD 112.5 each. Investors can purchase a minimum of 50 shares, with an entry fee of HKD 5,681.73. Dexel aims to raise approximately HKD 900 million through this IPO and is expected to be listed on March 30. Huatai International is serving as the sole sponsor for the offering.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Geopolitical Tensions May Boost Gold's Safe-Haven Appeal
data.description:
The ongoing geopolitical tensions and sustained high energy prices could significantly increase the downside risks to global economic growth, according to Tang Yuxuan, Head of Asia Rates and FX Strategy at JPMorgan Private Bank. According to Ming Pao, this situation may shift market focus from "inflation pricing" to "recession risk," potentially highlighting gold's traditional role as a safe-haven and hedging asset.

Tang further stated that JPMorgan continues to view gold as an effective portfolio diversification tool, given its low correlation with stocks and bonds. The bank maintains its year-end gold price outlook between $6,000 and $6,300 per ounce. If the geopolitical conflict does not trigger sustained safe-haven sentiment and a strong U.S. dollar, investors who previously felt they "missed the rally" might see the current pullback as an opportunity to gradually enter the market.

data.title: Survey Reveals Growing Importance of Digital Assets in Financial Services
data.description: A recent survey conducted by Ripple highlights the increasing significance of digital assets in the financial sector. According to NS3.AI, the survey, which included responses from over 1,000 financial industry leaders, revealed that 72% of participants consider digital assets crucial to financial services. Additionally, 74% of respondents view stablecoins as an effective tool for managing cash flow, while 89% prioritize digital asset custody. These findings underscore the evolving role of digital assets in modern financial strategies.
